title: CopilotKit Removal + Blank Page Root Cause Fix

checkpoints.22aaab55: Phase 101b — manualChunks removed, blank page fixed

work_completed: Rewrote App.tsx — clean BrowserRouter-only structure, no CopilotKit providers
Removed CopilotKit chunk rule and /api/copilotkit proxy from vite.config.ts

BLANK PAGE ROOT CAUSE IDENTIFIED: manualChunks in vite.config.ts split react-router-dom into a separate async 'router' chunk. BrowserRouter was loaded asynchronously, causing React to crash silently before mounting.
FIX: Removed all manualChunks from vite.config.ts — Vite now bundles everything naturally without async chunk splitting.
Production bundle: single index chunk + vendor, no async race conditions

root_cause_analysis.symptom: Blank page on citation.is — React never mounts, no console errors
root_cause_analysis.cause: vite.config.ts manualChunks split react-router-dom into 'router' chunk. When App.tsx imported BrowserRouter (qe), it came from an async ES module chunk. In production Cloud Run, this chunk load could fail or race with the createRoot call, causing React to crash silently.
root_cause_analysis.fix: Removed all manualChunks — Vite's default code splitting is safe. The manual split was premature optimization that broke the app.
root_cause_analysis.lesson: NEVER use manualChunks for core React dependencies (react, react-dom, react-router-dom, @tanstack/react-query). These must be synchronously available at mount time.

pending_next: Apply magic-link auth (Phase 100 work) on top of this checkpoint
Add 'Recently verified' section to homepage (pull 5 most recent claims from registry API)
Make Registry filters URL-persistent (encode verdict/vertical/page into query params)
Write Phase 101 to memory repo after each phase (user instruction)
important_notes: Production deployment succeeded — citation.is is live with new bundle
The SocketException api.manus.im error is a transient Cloud Run cold-start DNS issue, not a code bug
ttruthdesk.claims public REST API: GET /api/public/claims, GET /api/public/claims/:id — CORS open, 3863 claims
User instruction: write to memory repo after EACH phase
